case_title: MARYLON M BOYD VS. KIMBERLY BRAGG

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM BINDING ARBITRATION AWARD, GRANT PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION. PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER $900 AS REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES FOR BRINGING PETITION TO CONFIRM. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT BRAGG, KIMBERLY $10,768.68 PRINCIPAL, $900.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $159.49 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,828.17, WITH INTEREST AT THE RATE OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM JUNE 11, 2002 UNTIL FULLY PAID.
